dashboard.subtitle: A masterpiece begins with a single click
dashboard.subtitleLine2: AI-powered agile workflow that turns ideas into reality
dashboard.noProjectsHint: Create your first project and let AI bring your ideas to life

projects.title: Project Hall
projects.noProjectsHint: Click the "New" button above to create your first project

settings.languageDesc: Set the display language of the platform
settings.logDirectoryDesc: Startup failures, renderer crashes, and embedded server errors are saved here
settings.modelApiDesc: Configure AI model providers. Add multiple providers, each with multiple models. Use arrows to adjust priority order
settings.modelsPlaceholder: Type model name and press Enter
settings.noProvidersHint: Click the button below to add your first AI model provider
settings.shortcutsDesc: Customize keyboard shortcut bindings. Double-click the keybinding to edit, press the new combination and hit Enter to confirm
settings.floatingBallDesc: Enable a floating ball on the desktop for quick access to AI chat and common features
settings.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically check for new versions on startup
settings.updateDownloadedDesc: The update has been downloaded. Restart to install
settings.openSourceDesc: This project is built with the following open source software

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your workspace
auth.registerSubtitle: Enter your information to create a new account
auth.forgotDesc: Enter the local security password for this device to set a new login password for this email.
auth.forgotSuccess: Password reset. Please sign in with the new password.
auth.forgotDesktopOnly: Forgot password is only available in the desktop app
auth.securityPasswordPlaceholder: Enter the security password configured during setup
auth.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
auth.brandQuote:
This is a new way to develop.
Let AI handle tedious code logic,
while you focus on great creation.

projectDetail.promptPlaceholder:
Describe what you want to build, fix, or have the Agent do...

Example: 'Review the latest PR and identify potential performance bottlenecks'

plugins.craftDesc: Immersive workspace for pair programming with AI, with architecture diagrams and live preview
plugins.todoDesc: Manage requirements, AI auto-decomposes a sentence into executable dev sub-tasks
plugins.knowledgeBaseDesc: Dynamic API docs and architecture specs auto-generated by AI from codebase
plugins.todoComingSoonDesc: Task management module is under development. AI will help you decompose requirements into executable sub-tasks.
plugins.knowledgeBaseComingSoonDesc: Knowledge base module is under development. AI will auto-generate API docs and architecture specs from your codebase.

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.name: Project Name
projectSettings.nameDesc: Readable name shown in the workspace and notifications
projectSettings.slugDesc: Used as build directory name and URL path. Cannot be easily changed after saving
projectSettings.descHint: Optional. Brief description of the project's goals. AI Agent reads this for context
projectSettings.projectPromptDesc: Applies to this project only. Takes priority over global settings
projectSettings.archiveDesc: Mark project as read-only. AI Agent will stop listening, but all history and files are preserved
projectSettings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete this project and all related code, Agent memory and build artifacts. This action is irreversible

craft.aiHint: Write your thoughts, press Space to summon AI, / to insert diagrams
craft.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.
craft.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its contents? This action cannot be undone.
craft.noFilesHint: Create your first file to get started
craft.noFileSelected: Select a file to start editing

todo.title: Task Board
todo.aiPlaceholder:
Describe your tasks in natural language...

e.g.
User authentication module:
- Frontend: login page, registration page
- Backend: auth middleware, JWT management
todo.aiHint: Write your requirements naturally. AI will auto-recognize modules and crafts from your description.
todo.noModulesHint: Add modules and crafts from the calendar view
todo.deleteConfirm: Delete this craft? This action cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to OtherOne
welcome.subtitle: Talk is all you need.
welcome.desc: Redefining the productivity paradigm for the AI era. Let's get set up and begin your journey.

database.title: Database Connection
database.subtitle: Connect to your PostgreSQL database
database.desc: OtherOne requires a PostgreSQL database to store your projects, tasks, and more.
database.detectedDesc: A valid database configuration was found. You can skip this step or reconfigure.
database.passwordMissing: A previous database configuration was found, but the password is missing
database.passwordMissingDesc: Older versions did not preserve the password completely. Please enter the database password again and test the connection.

dbInit.title: Initialize Database
dbInit.subtitle: Set up the required database structure
dbInit.desc: We will create the necessary database tables for OtherOne to run properly. This operation will not affect your existing data.
dbInit.consent: I agree to create the required database structure for OtherOne
dbInit.detectedDesc: The required tables are already present in your database. You can skip this step.
dbInit.autoUpgradePendingDesc: The app will automatically fill in missing tables, columns, and indexes on startup. Save the database config or restart the app to apply it.

securityPassword.title: Security Password
securityPassword.subtitle: Set a local safety check
securityPassword.desc: The security password is stored only on this device and is required for dangerous actions and password recovery.
securityPassword.label: Security password
securityPassword.hint: If you lose this security password, you will need to reopen setup and configure the local environment again.
securityPassword.detected: A local security password is already configured
securityPassword.detectedDesc: This device already has a security password. You can also update it here.
securityPassword.minLength: Security password must be at least 6 characters
securityPassword.mismatch: The security passwords do not match
securityPassword.desktopOnly: Security password can only be configured in the desktop app

aiProvider.title: AI Provider Configuration
aiProvider.subtitle: Configure your AI model provider (optional)
aiProvider.desc: Set up an AI model provider to unlock intelligent features. You can also configure this later in Settings.
aiProvider.modelsPlaceholder: Type model name and press Enter
aiProvider.detectedDesc: Found {count} configured provider(s). You can skip this step or reconfigure.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.subtitle: Everything is configured and ready to go

globalAi.title: AI Assistant
globalAi.emptyHint: Ask me about your project, code, or anything else
